codes.term: Hemolytic anemia with emphysema AND cutis laxa (disorder)
codes.rationale: Hemolytic anemia with emphysema and cutis laxa is a rare genetic syndrome, not an instance of primary COPD.

codes.term: Congenital lobar emphysema of bilateral lungs (disorder)
codes.rationale: Congenital lobar emphysema is a congenital condition, not primary COPD (which is acquired).
Paraseptal emphysema is a specific pathological type of emphysema that may be congenital or acquired independently of COPD; not all emphysema is COPD.
Congenital emphysema is a separate congenital condition, not an instance of primary COPD.
Panacinar emphysema is a specific pathological type of emphysema that may occur independently; not all emphysema is COPD.
Congenital lobar emphysema is a separate congenital condition, not an instance of primary COPD.
Centriacinar emphysema is a specific pathological type of emphysema that may occur independently; not all emphysema is COPD.

codes.term: Bronchial atresia with segmental pulmonary emphysema (disorder)
codes.rationale: Bronchial atresia with segmental pulmonary emphysema is a congenital condition, not an instance of primary COPD.

codes.term: Acute non-infective exacerbation of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (disorder)
codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of COPD is a complication/episode of COPD, not the primary chronic condition itself.
Occupational bronchitis is a specific occupational disease; while it may lead to COPD, it is a distinct condition not named as COPD.

codes.term: Pulmonary emphysema co-occurrent with fibrosis of lung (disorder)
codes.rationale: Pulmonary emphysema with lung fibrosis is a separate condition (emphysema-fibrosis overlap); not a primary COPD instance.
Catarrhal bronchitis is an acute/subacute inflammatory condition, not chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
Chronic emphysema caused by vapor is a specific etiology variant; unclear if this represents primary COPD or occupational disease.

summary: Recall: 67.9% (38 of 56 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 86.4%. F1: 76.0%. 12 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.

scored_codes.rationale: This is a risk assessment code, not a clinical instance of COPD; it describes risk status rather than the condition itself.

scored_codes.term: Rheumatoid lung disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Rheumatoid lung disease is a separate condition associated with rheumatoid arthritis, not an instance of primary COPD.

scored_codes.term: At increased risk of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
scored_codes.rationale: This is a risk assessment code indicating increased risk, not a clinical instance of COPD itself.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease accident and emergency attendance since last visit
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative/encounter code about A&E attendance, not a clinical instance of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Congenital emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Congenital emphysema is a separate congenital condition, not an instance of primary COPD.

scored_codes.term: Panacinar emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Panacinar emphysema is a specific pathological type of emphysema that may occur independently; not all emphysema is COPD.

scored_codes.term: Congenital lobar emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Congenital lobar emphysema is a separate congenital condition, not an instance of primary COPD.

scored_codes.term: Centriacinar emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Centriacinar emphysema is a specific pathological type of emphysema that may occur independently; not all emphysema is COPD.

scored_codes.term: Bronchial atresia with segmental pulmonary emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Bronchial atresia with segmental pulmonary emphysema is a congenital condition, not an instance of primary COPD.

scored_codes.term: Acute non-infective exacerbation of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of COPD is a complication/episode of COPD, not the primary chronic condition itself.

scored_codes.term: Chronic asthma with fixed airflow obstruction
scored_codes.rationale: Chronic asthma with fixed airflow obstruction is asthma, not COPD, despite airflow obstruction overlap.

scored_codes.term: Occupational bronchitis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Occupational bronchitis is a specific occupational disease; while it may lead to COPD, it is a distinct condition not named as COPD.

scored_codes.term: Pulmonary emphysema co-occurrent with fibrosis of lung (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Pulmonary emphysema with lung fibrosis is a separate condition (emphysema-fibrosis overlap); not a primary COPD instance.

scored_codes.term: Chronic allergic bronchitis
scored_codes.rationale: Chronic allergic bronchitis is an allergic condition, not primary COPD.

scored_codes.term: Catarrhal bronchitis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Catarrhal bronchitis is an acute/subacute inflammatory condition, not chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
